attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
    GL.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY 
	,GL.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
	,GL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
	,GL.PRODUCT_KEY
	,GL.AR_TRX_KEY 
	,GL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
	,GL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
	,GL.END_CUSTOMER_KEY 
    ,GL.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 
    ,GL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 
    ,GL.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 
	,GL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
    ,GL.SALES_REP_NUMBER 
    ,GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
	,GL.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD
	,GL.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD 
	,GL.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD 
	,GL.GL_DT
	,GL.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD         
	,GL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD   
	,GL.GL_POSTED_DTM                       
    ,GL.DD_GL_DATETIME  
    ,GL.BK_SS_CD
	,CASE WHEN GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'IND_ADJ'THEN 0  
ELSE GL.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT END GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT 
    ,CASE WHEN GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'IND_ADJ'THEN 0  
ELSE GL.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT END GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT 
    ,CASE WHEN GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'IND_ADJ'THEN 'MANUALS'   
 ELSE 'REVENUE' END DV_MEASURE_TYPE_CD 
    ,GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT 
    ,GL.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD    
    ,GL.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT	
	,GL.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD , 
    GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD, 
    GL.BK_COMPANY_CODE  , 
    GL.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE ,
    GL.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY , 
    GL.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT, 
    GL.DV_PRODUCT_KEY , 
    GL.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD, 
    GL.DV_ERP_DEAL_ID, 
	PR./*PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_I*/RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID     ,       
    PR./*SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID*/RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID , 
    PR.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE ,
	PR.RU_SOFTWARE_SUBSCRIPTION_CD,  
    PR.NEW_PRODUCT_FLG,  
    PR.PRODUCT_PRICING_CATEGORY_CD,
    PR.FIRST_CUSTOMER_SHIP_DT,	 
    PR.SHIPPABLE_FLG,  
	CASE WHEN GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'AR-OOD'  AND GL.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY BETWEEN 640466537 AND 729374185 
        THEN  CAST( CAST( /* AMOUNT COLUMN* - START */ 
       CASE  
  WHEN GL.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='CM' AND SATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' THEN SATIL.RU_OFFER_ATRBTD_CRDT_TRX_AMT 
  WHEN GL.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='CM' AND SATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'N' THEN SATIL.RU_CREDIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT   
  WHEN GL.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='DM' AND SATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' THEN SATIL.RU_OFFER_ATRBTD_DBT_TRX_AMT 
  WHEN GL.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='DM' AND SATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'N' THEN SATIL.RU_DEBIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT  
  WHEN GL.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='INV' AND SATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' THEN SATIL.RU_OFFER_ATRBTD_DBT_TRX_AMT 
  WHEN GL.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='INV' AND SATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'N' THEN SATIL.RU_DEBIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT   
                      ELSE 0.0000000 
          END /* AMOUNT COLUMN* - END */ 
          /* INVOICE TO FUNCTIONAL CONVERSION  RATE - START */ 
         *(CASE WHEN GL.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD         = GL.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD OR ART.RU_TRXNL_TO_USD_CONVERSION_RT IS NULL   THEN 1.000000000000000 ELSE ART.RU_TRXNL_TO_USD_CONVERSION_RT END ) 
        AS DECIMAL(26,7))   
        --*(COALESCE(SDNRTFR.SPLIT_PCT  , COALESCE(GL.SPLIT_PCT,100.0000000)) /100.0000000) /* commented after the split % corrected in the measures */ 
        *(COALESCE(GL.SPLIT_PCT, (COALESCE(SDNRTFR.SPLIT_PCT,100.0000000)))/100.0000000)    AS DECIMAL(26,7))  
     
   WHEN GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'AR' AND GL.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY > 0 THEN 
          CAST( 
     CAST( /* AMOUNT COLUMN* - START */ 
          (NRA.RU_REV_TRNSFR_TRXNL_CRDT_AMT-NRA.RU_REV_TRNSFR_TRXNL_DEBIT_AMT )  /*GL is rev record*/ 
  /* AMOUNT COLUMN* - END */ 
          /* INVOICE TO FUNCTIONAL CONVERSION  RATE - START */ 
         *(CASE WHEN GL.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD         = GL.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD OR SCCDRIF.PL_CONVERSION_RATE IS NULL   THEN 1.000000000000000 ELSE SCCDRIF.PL_CONVERSION_RATE END ) 
        AS DECIMAL(26,7))   
  *(COALESCE(GL.SPLIT_PCT, (COALESCE(SDNRTFR.SPLIT_PCT,100.0000000)))/100.0000000)    AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
  
  WHEN GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'AR' AND GL.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY > 0 THEN 
          CAST( 
     CAST( /* AMOUNT COLUMN* - START */ 
          (NXO.CREDIT_TRXNL_AMT-NXO.DEBIT_TRXNL_AMT )  /*GL is rev record*/ 
  /* AMOUNT COLUMN* - END */ 
          /* INVOICE TO FUNCTIONAL CONVERSION  RATE - START */ 
         *(CASE WHEN GL.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD         = GL.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD OR SCCDRIF.PL_CONVERSION_RATE IS NULL   THEN 1.000000000000000 ELSE SCCDRIF.PL_CONVERSION_RATE END ) 
        AS DECIMAL(26,7))   
  *(COALESCE(GL.SPLIT_PCT, (COALESCE(SDNRTFR.SPLIT_PCT,100.0000000)))/100.0000000)    AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
     /*CSPP CHANGES*/

    WHEN GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'AR' AND GL.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY > 0 THEN 
          CAST( 
     CAST( /* AMOUNT COLUMN* - START */ 
          (NROL.RU_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT -NROL.RU_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT )  /*GL IS REV RECORD*/ 
  /* AMOUNT COLUMN* - END */ 
          /* INVOICE TO FUNCTIONAL CONVERSION  RATE - START */ 
         *(CASE WHEN GL.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD         = GL.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD OR SCCDRIF.PL_CONVERSION_RATE IS NULL   THEN 1.000000000000000 ELSE SCCDRIF.PL_CONVERSION_RATE END ) 
        AS DECIMAL(26,7))   
  *(COALESCE(GL.SPLIT_PCT, (COALESCE(SDNRTFR.SPLIT_PCT,100.0000000)))/100.0000000)    AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
 
  ELSE 
  CAST( 
     CAST( /* AMOUNT COLUMN* - START */ 
       CASE  
  WHEN GL.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='CM' AND SATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' THEN SATIL.RU_OFFER_ATRBTD_CRDT_TRX_AMT 
  WHEN GL.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='CM' AND SATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'N' THEN SATIL.RU_CREDIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT   
  WHEN GL.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='DM' AND SATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' THEN SATIL.RU_OFFER_ATRBTD_DBT_TRX_AMT 
  WHEN GL.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='DM' AND SATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'N' THEN SATIL.RU_DEBIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT  
  WHEN GL.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='INV' AND SATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' THEN SATIL.RU_OFFER_ATRBTD_DBT_TRX_AMT 
  WHEN GL.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='INV' AND SATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'N' THEN SATIL.RU_DEBIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT  
              ELSE 0.0000000 
          END /* AMOUNT COLUMN* - END */ 
          /* INVOICE TO FUNCTIONAL CONVERSION  RATE - START */ 
         *(CASE WHEN GL.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD         = GL.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD OR SCCDRIF.PL_CONVERSION_RATE IS NULL   THEN 1.000000000000000 ELSE SCCDRIF.PL_CONVERSION_RATE END ) 
        AS DECIMAL(26,7))   
       --*(COALESCE(SDNRTFR.SPLIT_PCT  , COALESCE(GL.SPLIT_PCT,100.0000000)) /100.0000000)  /* commented after the split % corrected in the measures */ 
       *(COALESCE(GL.SPLIT_PCT, (COALESCE(SDNRTFR.SPLIT_PCT,100.0000000)))/100.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7))  
       END AS DV_FUNC_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT , 
	   
	   GL.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY, 
	   CASE WHEN GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'AR-OOD'  AND  GL.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY BETWEEN 640466537 AND 729374185    
        THEN 
        CAST( 
        CAST( 
     CAST( /* AMOUNT COLUMN* - START */ 
       CASE  
  WHEN GL.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='CM' AND SATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' THEN SATIL.RU_OFFER_ATRBTD_CRDT_TRX_AMT 
  WHEN GL.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='CM' AND SATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'N' THEN SATIL.RU_CREDIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT   
  WHEN GL.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='DM' AND SATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' THEN SATIL.RU_OFFER_ATRBTD_DBT_TRX_AMT 
  WHEN GL.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='DM' AND SATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'N' THEN SATIL.RU_DEBIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT  
  WHEN GL.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='INV' AND SATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' THEN SATIL.RU_OFFER_ATRBTD_DBT_TRX_AMT 
  WHEN GL.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='INV' AND SATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'N' THEN SATIL.RU_DEBIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT  
              ELSE 0.0000000 
          END /* AMOUNT COLUMN* - END */ 
          /* INVOICE TO FUNCTIONAL CONVERSION  RATE - START */ 
         *(CASE WHEN GL.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD         = GL.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD OR ART.RU_TRXNL_TO_USD_CONVERSION_RT IS NULL   THEN 1.000000000000000 ELSE ART.RU_TRXNL_TO_USD_CONVERSION_RT END ) 
        AS DECIMAL(26,7))   
        *(CASE WHEN GL.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD='USD' OR SCCDRFU.PL_CONVERSION_RATE IS NULL  THEN 1.000000000000000 ELSE SCCDRFU.PL_CONVERSION_RATE END )  
        /* FUNCTIONAL TO USD CONVERSION RATE - END */ 
       AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
     /* APPLY SPLIT PERCENTAGE ADJUSTMENT - START */   
   --*(COALESCE(SDNRTFR.SPLIT_PCT  , COALESCE(GL.SPLIT_PCT,100.0000000)) /100.0000000) /* commented after the split % corrected in the measures */ 
     *(COALESCE(GL.SPLIT_PCT, (COALESCE(SDNRTFR.SPLIT_PCT,100.0000000)))/100.0000000)    AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
 
  WHEN GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'AR' AND GL.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY > 0 THEN 
  CAST( 
    CAST( 
     CAST( /* AMOUNT COLUMN* - START */ 
       (NRA.RU_REV_TRNSFR_TRXNL_CRDT_AMT-NRA.RU_REV_TRNSFR_TRXNL_DEBIT_AMT )  
    /* AMOUNT COLUMN* - END */ 
          /* INVOICE TO FUNCTIONAL CONVERSION  RATE - START */ 
         *      
         (CASE WHEN GL.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD         = GL.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD OR SCCDRIF.PL_CONVERSION_RATE IS NULL   THEN 1.000000000000000 ELSE SCCDRIF.PL_CONVERSION_RATE END ) 
        AS DECIMAL(26,7))      
         
         /* INVOICE TO FUNCTIONAL CONVERSION  RATE - END */ 
        /* FUNCTIONAL TO USD CONVERSION RATE - START */ 
        *(CASE WHEN GL.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD='USD' OR SCCDRFU.PL_CONVERSION_RATE IS NULL  THEN 1.000000000000000 ELSE SCCDRFU.PL_CONVERSION_RATE END )  
        /* FUNCTIONAL TO USD CONVERSION RATE - END */ 
       AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
     /* APPLY SPLIT PERCENTAGE ADJUSTMENT - START */   
     *(COALESCE(GL.SPLIT_PCT, (COALESCE(SDNRTFR.SPLIT_PCT,100.0000000)))/100.0000000)   AS DECIMAL(26,7))  

WHEN GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'AR' AND GL.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY > 0 THEN 
  CAST( 
    CAST( 
     CAST( /* AMOUNT COLUMN* - START */ 
       (NXO.CREDIT_TRXNL_AMT-NXO.DEBIT_TRXNL_AMT )  
    /* AMOUNT COLUMN* - END */ 
          /* INVOICE TO FUNCTIONAL CONVERSION  RATE - START */ 
         *      
         (CASE WHEN GL.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD         = GL.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD OR SCCDRIF.PL_CONVERSION_RATE IS NULL   THEN 1.000000000000000 ELSE SCCDRIF.PL_CONVERSION_RATE END ) 
        AS DECIMAL(26,7))      
         
         /* INVOICE TO FUNCTIONAL CONVERSION  RATE - END */ 
        /* FUNCTIONAL TO USD CONVERSION RATE - START */ 
        *(CASE WHEN GL.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD='USD' OR SCCDRFU.PL_CONVERSION_RATE IS NULL  THEN 1.000000000000000 ELSE SCCDRFU.PL_CONVERSION_RATE END )  
        /* FUNCTIONAL TO USD CONVERSION RATE - END */ 
       AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
     /* APPLY SPLIT PERCENTAGE ADJUSTMENT - START */   
     *(COALESCE(GL.SPLIT_PCT, (COALESCE(SDNRTFR.SPLIT_PCT,100.0000000)))/100.0000000)   AS DECIMAL(26,7))    
    /*CSPP CHANGES*/
WHEN GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'AR' AND GL.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY > 0 THEN 
  CAST( 
    CAST( 
     CAST( 
       (NROL.RU_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT-NROL.RU_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT )  
         *      
         (CASE WHEN GL.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD         = GL.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD OR SCCDRIF.PL_CONVERSION_RATE IS NULL   THEN 1.000000000000000 ELSE SCCDRIF.PL_CONVERSION_RATE END ) 
        AS DECIMAL(26,7))      
        *(CASE WHEN GL.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD='USD' OR SCCDRFU.PL_CONVERSION_RATE IS NULL  THEN 1.000000000000000 ELSE SCCDRFU.PL_CONVERSION_RATE END )  
               AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
         *(COALESCE(GL.SPLIT_PCT, (COALESCE(SDNRTFR.SPLIT_PCT,100.0000000)))/100.0000000)   AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
 
 
  ELSE 
  CAST( 
    CAST( 
     CAST( /* AMOUNT COLUMN* - START */ 
       CASE  
  WHEN GL.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='CM' AND SATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' THEN SATIL.RU_OFFER_ATRBTD_CRDT_TRX_AMT 
  WHEN GL.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='CM' AND SATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'N' THEN SATIL.RU_CREDIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT   
  WHEN GL.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='DM' AND SATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' THEN SATIL.RU_OFFER_ATRBTD_DBT_TRX_AMT 
  WHEN GL.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='DM' AND SATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'N' THEN SATIL.RU_DEBIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT  
  WHEN GL.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='INV' AND SATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' THEN SATIL.RU_OFFER_ATRBTD_DBT_TRX_AMT 
  WHEN GL.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='INV' AND SATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'N' THEN SATIL.RU_DEBIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT  
              ELSE 0.0000000 
          END /* AMOUNT COLUMN* - END */ 
          /* INVOICE TO FUNCTIONAL CONVERSION  RATE - START */ 
         *      
         (CASE WHEN GL.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD         = GL.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD OR SCCDRIF.PL_CONVERSION_RATE IS NULL   THEN 1.000000000000000 ELSE SCCDRIF.PL_CONVERSION_RATE END ) 
        AS DECIMAL(26,7))      
         
         /* INVOICE TO FUNCTIONAL CONVERSION  RATE - END */ 
        /* FUNCTIONAL TO USD CONVERSION RATE - START */ 
        *(CASE WHEN GL.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD='USD' OR SCCDRFU.PL_CONVERSION_RATE IS NULL  THEN 1.000000000000000 ELSE SCCDRFU.PL_CONVERSION_RATE END )  
        /* FUNCTIONAL TO USD CONVERSION RATE - END */ 
       AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
     /* APPLY SPLIT PERCENTAGE ADJUSTMENT - START */   
   --*(COALESCE(SDNRTFR.SPLIT_PCT  , COALESCE(GL.SPLIT_PCT,100.0000000)) /100.0000000) /* commented after the split % corrected in the measures */ 
     *(COALESCE(GL.SPLIT_PCT, (COALESCE(SDNRTFR.SPLIT_PCT,100.0000000)))/100.0000000)   AS DECIMAL(26,7))   
       END AS DV_USD_EXT_INVOICE_AMOUNT 
      ,GL.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME EDW_CREATE_DTM	   
	  ,'USER'EDW_CREATE_USER               
      ,GL.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME EDW_UPDATE_DTM    
      ,'USER' AS EDW_UPDATE_USER               
	   ,GL.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD,
	   GL.DV_FMV_FLG ,
       GL.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,  
       GL.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY,
       GL.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY,
       SV_RTM.AS_OF_FSC_MTH_CHANNEL_FLG ,
       SV_RTM.AS_OF_FSC_MTH_PARTNER_TYPE_CD ,
       SV_RTM.DV_AS_OF_FSC_MTH_RTM_CD  ,
       SV_RTM.CHANNEL_FLG  ,
	   GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT ,
	   CASE WHEN PR.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE ='GOODS' THEN PR./*PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID*/ RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID      ELSE PR./*SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID*/ RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID END DV_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID ,
	   GL.DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT ,
	   GL.DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT,
	   GL.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
       GL.ELA_FLG, 
       GL.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG,
	   GL.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME ,
       SV_RTM.PARTNER_TYPE_CD,
       GL.POB_TYPE_CD,
       GL.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD 	 ,  
       GL.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,
       GL.RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG,
       SV_RTM.DV_ROUTE_TO_MARKET_CD         ,
	   GL.XCAT_FLG,
   /* Added as part of CSPP Project  */
   GL.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD,
   GL.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_RSTD_GL_REV_MEASURE GL 
  LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV SDNRTFR  
    ON (GL.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY  = SDNRTFR .DRVD_NCR_REVENUE_KEY 
    AND GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD IN ( 'AR','AR-OOD'))   
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_FIN PR 
    ON (PR.ITEM_KEY=GL.PRODUCT_KEY)     
	
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_REVENUE_TRANSFER NRA 
  ON (NRA.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY=GL.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE   NXO 
   ON (NXO.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY=GL.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY)  
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NROL  /*CSPP CHANGES*/
   ON (NROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY=GL.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY)      
  INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLDB.N_AR_TRX ART 
  ON(GL.AR_TRX_KEY=ART.AR_TRX_KEY) 
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE SATL 
    ON (GL.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY) 
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE  SATIL                    
           ON ( GL.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = SATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY )   
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  FISCAL
   ON FISCAL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT     
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE SCCDRIF                    
    ON ( GL.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD         = SCCDRIF./*FROM_CURRENCY_CODE*/BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE                           
    AND GL.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD = SCCDRIF./*TO_CURRENCY_CODE*/BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE                              
    AND GL.GL_DT =     SCCDRIF./*CONVERSION_DATE*/BK_CONVERSION_DATE             )   
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE SCCDRFU                  
    ON ( GL.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD = SCCDRFU.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE            
    AND  SCCDRFU.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE = 'USD'              
    AND GL.GL_DT = SCCDRFU./*CONVERSION_DATE*/BK_CONVERSION_DATE             )
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_GL_CHANNEL_REV_MEASURE SV_RTM
ON SV_RTM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY =GL.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
AND SV_RTM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT =GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
AND SV_RTM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD =GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
WHERE  
   GL.DV_SERVICE_FLG='Y'
  AND
  /*( ( GL.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY < 0 AND 
   GL.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('STANDALONE','ATTRIBUTED') added to filter out bundle transaction
     )
     OR 
     GL.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY > 0
    ) commented as part of Q1FY15 release */
  GL.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('STANDALONE','ATTRIBUTED') /*added as part of Q1FY15 release */
  --OCT 13-REMOVED AS SUGGESTED BY THAMMANNA
  --AND RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE='CORP. REVENUE'
  AND ( ( GL.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY < 0 AND GL.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY < 0 AND GL.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY < 0 AND 
     (SATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE='LINE' AND GL.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT IN ('41001','43310', '43320'))
     OR (GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'IND_ADJ' AND  PR.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID <> 'SERVICE')
     OR ( GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'DRCT_AS_T') /* NEW CONDITION TO BRING IN DIRECT ADJUSTMENT - ADDED AS PART OF ICPM R4 AS-TRANSACTION DATA*/
     ) 
  OR (GL.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY > 0 AND 
  GL.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT IN ('41001','43310', '43320')
  )
  OR (GL.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY > 0 AND 
  GL.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT IN ('41001','43310', '43320')
  )
OR (GL.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY > 0 AND GL.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT IN ('41001','43310', '43320'))    
  )
  AND GL.RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG = 'N'
  
  --AND FISCAL.FISCAL_YEAR_AGE <=4
   AND FISCAL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR WHERE PREVIOUS_FSCL_MONTH_FLAG = 'Y')
  AND GL.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG = 'Y'
